summary: Iter-2 testing of FusionCC: dashboard abandoned analytics + multi-type Reports w/ XLSX+PDF export. Backend 25/25 pytest passed. Frontend end-to-end flow (login -> dashboard abandoned tabs -> reports 6 tabs -> XLSX & PDF download) all working.

issues: Recharts logs many 'width(-1) and height(-1) of chart' console warnings during initial render. Charts render fine afterwards but warning noise indicates ResponsiveContainer mounts before parent has dimensions. Consider setting explicit height or aspect prop, or wrapping in a sized div.

action_items: (Low) Silence Recharts width=-1/height=-1 warnings by giving ResponsiveContainer parent a deterministic height or use aspect prop.

(Low) Login redirects to '/' instead of '/dashboard' after success. Works because '/' renders dashboard, but if a /dashboard route exists, redirecting there would be cleaner and matches the app structure described in the spec.
critical_code_review_comments: CORS uses allow_origin_regex='.*' with allow_credentials=True. Starlette handles this by echoing the request Origin (verified: preflight returns explicit origin, not '*'), so no wildcard+credentials conflict. OK for preview, but for production consider an explicit allow-list of trusted origins.
server.py is ~895 lines mixing auth, seed, dashboard, reports, exports. Should be split into routers (auth.py, dashboard.py, reports.py) and a seed.py module per the >700-line guideline.
_build_report 'agents' & 'queues' issue 2 count_documents per item (N+1 queries). For 8 agents/4 queues it's negligible, but switch to a single $facet aggregation if data grows.
datetime.fromisoformat is used on stored ISO strings; OK now but storing native datetime in Mongo would be cheaper and avoid try/except per row.
JWT_SECRET fetched via os.environ['JWT_SECRET'] inside _secret() each call — fine, but caching once at startup avoids repeated env lookups.

success_rate.frontend: 100% on tested flows (login, dashboard abandoned, reports 6 tabs, xlsx, pdf)

seed_data_creation: None — relied on existing seed (8 agents, 4 queues, 400 calls, ~280 recordings).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend regression suite at /app/backend/tests/test_callcenter_api.py covers: auth (login/me/protected/CORS preflight), dashboard/stats, dashboard/abandoned (24/7/4 buckets + totals + by_queue), realtime, agents, queues, recordings, reports/agents legacy, reports/types (6 keys), reports/data parametrized over 6 types, invalid type 400, calls filter by agent_id and queue_id, reports/export xlsx (PK signature), pdf (%PDF header), invalid format 400. Run: pytest /app/backend/tests/test_callcenter_api.py -v.
verified_endpoints: GET /api/reports/data with agent_id and queue_id filters (calls)
